name: Aleph
sense: Ox — strength, the first, the leader

name: Bet
sense: House — tent, dwelling, family within

name: Gimel
sense: Foot — to gather, to lift up, to walk

name: Dalet
sense: Door — pathway, to enter, to hang

name: Hey
sense: Behold — arms lifted, breath, revelation

name: Vav
sense: Nail — to fasten, to join, and

name: Zayin
sense: Mattock — to cut, to harvest, a weapon

name: Chet
sense: Wall — to separate, to enclose, to protect

name: Tet
sense: Basket — to surround, to contain, to store

name: Yod
sense: Hand — work, deed, that which is made

name: Kaf
sense: Open palm — to cover, to allow, to bend

name: Lamed
sense: Shepherd's staff — to teach, to lead, authority

name: Mem
sense: Water — the deep, chaos, the mighty

name: Nun
sense: Seed — life, continuation, the heir

name: Samech
sense: Prop — to support, to uphold, to turn

name: Ayin
sense: Eye — to see, to know, to experience

name: Pey
sense: Mouth — to speak, to open, the word

name: Tsade
sense: Hook — to catch, to desire, the righteous one

name: Qof
sense: Sun at the horizon — behind, the last, a circle

name: Resh
sense: Head — the first, the highest, a person

name: Shin
sense: Teeth — to consume, to press, the sharp

name: Tav
sense: Mark — a sign, a covenant, the cross
